title: goniopteris multilineata
intro: Goniopteris multilineata, also known as the Multilineate Fern or Manjishtha, is a plant species belonging to the family Blechnaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Goniopteris multilineata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or decoction, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
